accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya (RfM) provides easy access to RenderMan features via either a Maya-centric workflow (including Maya-style pattern nodes, etc.) or in conjunction with the other tools.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya (RfM) 可通过以 Maya 为中心的 workflow（包括 Maya-style pattern nodes 等），或结合其他 tools，轻松访问 RenderMan features（功能）。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The plugin also connects Maya with RenderMan Pro Server in new ways, leading to fast interactive results without the need of writing RIB. The RIB-out functionality continues to support existing pipelines and farm rendering. RfM provides truly seamless access to RenderMan's speed, power, and stability for Maya users, who can maintain a simple, Maya-centric workflow, or take advantage of the plugins' flexibility to create an optimal, customized pipeline.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 该 plugin 还以新的方式连接 Maya 与 RenderMan Pro Server，无需编写 RIB 即可获得快速的 interactive results（交互式结果）。RIB-out functionality 会继续支持现有 pipelines 和 farm rendering。RfM 为 Maya users 提供对 RenderMan 速度、能力和稳定性的真正无缝访问；他们既可以保持简单的 Maya-centric workflow，也可以利用 plugin 的灵活性创建 optimal、customized pipeline。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya requires the installation of RenderMan Pro Server as well as the RfM plugin in order to function correctly. The RenderMan installer does this automatically.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya 需要同时安装 RenderMan Pro Server 和 RfM 插件才能正确运行。RenderMan 安装程序会自动完成这一点。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: " is a robust framebuffer/render view window, offering complete floating-point support and a powerful and flexible catalog, as well as a fast and powerful imaging tool that is capable of production-quality image manipulation and compositing usually found only in high-end standalone products. Thanks to its integration with the plugin and an all-new Python scripting interface, "it" gives users the ability to incorporate sophisticated post-render image operations into their rendering pipeline.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: " 是一个 robust framebuffer/render view window，提供完整的 floating-point support 和强大、灵活的 catalog，同时也是一个快速强大的 imaging tool，能够执行通常只有高端 standalone products 才具备的 production-quality image manipulation 和 compositing。得益于它与 plugin 的集成以及全新的 Python scripting interface，"it" 让用户能够把 sophisticated post-render image operations 纳入自己的 rendering pipeline。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Features
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Features

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya supports advanced rendering features that are not native to Maya. Because these advanced features are not supported directly by Maya, RfM provides its own techniques for creating and controlling these effects. These techniques are usually as simple as attaching and configuring RenderMan-specific attributes to geometry, lights, and/or materials. Photo Realistic RenderMan (PRMan) is designed to be fast and easy to use while generating production-quality renders and global illumination works out of the box and interactive rendering provides rapid iteration for artists.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya 支持 Maya 原生不具备的 advanced rendering features。由于 Maya 不直接支持这些 advanced features，RfM 提供了自己的 techniques 来创建和控制这些 effects。这些 techniques 通常很简单，只需把 RenderMan-specific attributes 附加并配置到 geometry、lights 和/或 materials 上。Photo Realistic RenderMan (PRMan) 被设计为快速且易用，同时生成 production-quality renders；global illumination 开箱即用，interactive rendering 可为 artists 提供快速迭代。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: True Interactive Rendering
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: True Interactive Rendering（真正的交互式渲染）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Render to Viewport 2.0
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Render to Viewport 2.0

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Render interactively directly to the Maya viewport by choosing RenderMan as your renderer. Make scene changes, edit parameters, and more without having to restart the render.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 选择 RenderMan 作为 renderer，即可直接向 Maya viewport 进行 interactive render。无需重新启动 render，就可以修改 scene、编辑 parameters 等。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Improved Interactive Creation of AOVs and LPEs
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Improved Interactive Creation of AOVs and LPEs（改进的 AOV 与 LPE 交互式创建）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The streamlined interface for creating AOVs and custom LPEs is the single location to define the outputs you need for post-processing workflows that update during live rendering.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 用于创建 AOVs 和 custom LPEs 的 streamlined interface 是定义所需 outputs 的单一位置；这些 outputs 可用于 live rendering 期间更新的 post-processing workflows。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Analytic Area Lights
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Analytic Area Lights（解析 Area Lights）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Area Lights are a powerful way to create physically accurate lighting while optimizing sampling budgets and, in turn, performance. PRMan's
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Area Lights 是创建 physically accurate lighting 的强大方式，同时可以优化 sampling budgets，并进而优化 performance。PRMan 的

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: area lights
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: area lights

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: light filters
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: light filters

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: , as well as light-linking, groups, per-group AOVs, and IES profiles and portals.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: ，以及 light-linking、groups、per-group AOVs、IES profiles 和 portals。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Global Illumination
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Global Illumination（全局照明）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Sometimes called "Indirect Illumination," RenderMan for Maya supports Global Illumination effects, subtle diffuse shading effects that are created by sampling the lighting of a scene many times from a given point. This technique can yield highly realistic results. Occlusion, which merely samples the "coverage" of a point (and is cheaper than Indirect Illumination), is also supported automatically or through the
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 有时也称为 “Indirect Illumination”，RenderMan for Maya 支持 Global Illumination effects。这些 subtle diffuse shading effects 是从给定 point 多次 sample scene lighting 后产生的。该 technique 可以得到高度真实的结果。Occlusion 只是 sample 一个 point 的 “coverage”（并且比 Indirect Illumination 更便宜），也会自动支持，或通过

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: PxrOcclusion
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: PxrOcclusion

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Integrator.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Integrator 支持。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Volume Rendering
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Volume Rendering（体积渲染）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RfM includes PRMan's first-class
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RfM 包含 PRMan 的一流

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: rendering capabilities, enabling the creation of volumetric effects using OpenVDB 5.0, including Maya's Fluid Effects, with full PRMan support - motion blur, multi-scattering, non-homogenous, etc.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: rendering capabilities，可使用 OpenVDB 5.0 创建 volumetric effects，包括 Maya 的 Fluid Effects，并提供完整 PRMan support：motion blur、multi-scattering、non-homogenous 等。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: True Curved Surfaces
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: True Curved Surfaces（真正的曲面）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Tessellation settings are never an issue with RenderMan when rendering
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 使用 RenderMan render

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: subdivision
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: subdivision

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: surfaces. Since RenderMan renders true curved surfaces, NURBS and subdivision surfaces will never have faceting artifacts. Maya's tessellation mode settings are simply ignored and the benefits of RenderMan are immediately realized.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: surfaces 时，tessellation settings 从来不是问题。由于 RenderMan 会 render true curved surfaces，NURBS 和 subdivision surfaces 永远不会出现 faceting artifacts。Maya 的 tessellation mode settings 会被直接忽略，RenderMan 的优势会立即体现出来。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Subsurface Scattering
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Subsurface Scattering

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya supports subsurface scattering, an important effect for realistically rendering translucent materials, like skin, flesh, fat, fruits, milk, marble, and many others. Subsurface scattering is responsible for effects like color bleeding inside materials, or the diffusion of light across shadow boundaries. RfM includes support for path-traced subsurface scattering through materials shipped with RenderMan.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya 支持 Subsurface Scattering，这是 realistic rendering translucent materials 的重要 effect，例如 skin、flesh、fat、fruits、milk、marble 以及许多其他 materials。Subsurface scattering 负责 material 内部的 color bleeding、或 shadow boundaries 之间的 light diffusion 等 effects。RfM 通过 RenderMan 随附的 materials 支持 path-traced subsurface scattering。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Secondary Outputs
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Secondary Outputs（二级输出）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya supports secondary outputs (AOVs, or Arbitrary Output Variables), which can be any arbitrary information contained in a shader. Users may also take advantage of Light Path Expressions (LPE) for powerful control over outputs.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya 支持 secondary outputs（AOVs，即 Arbitrary Output Variables），它们可以是 shader 中包含的任意信息。用户还可以利用 Light Path Expressions（LPE）对 outputs 进行强力控制。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Studio Quality RenderMan Shaders
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Studio Quality RenderMan Shaders（电影工作室品质的 RenderMan Shaders）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan ships with the same
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan 随附 Pixar 在 feature films 中使用的同一套

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: use by Pixar on their feature films. This allows artists to bring the full power of RenderMan to their projects, providing a higher level of control than what is possible using Maya's built-in materials.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 。这让 artists 可以把 RenderMan 的全部能力带入自己的 projects，并提供比 Maya built-in materials 更高层级的 control。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Ri Procedurals
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Ri Procedurals

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: As the foundation of a RIB-based pipeline, RenderMan for Maya supports all manner of procedurals. Additionally, RenderMan for Maya provides simple support for procedurals.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 作为 RIB-based pipeline 的 foundation，RenderMan for Maya 支持各种 procedurals。此外，RenderMan for Maya 还为 procedurals 提供简单支持。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Down the Pipe(line)
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Down the Pipe(line)

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya is one piece of a potentially sophisticated production pipeline. In order to get your work from script to screen, you may need more, and that is where Tractor and RenderMan Pro Server enters the picture. By implementing RfM in concert with Tractor and RenderMan Pro Server (RPS), users can achieve a seamlessly integrated rendering workflow from desktop to renderfarm.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya 是潜在 sophisticated production pipeline 中的一部分。为了把 work 从 script 带到 screen，你可能还需要更多工具，这时 Tractor 和 RenderMan Pro Server 就会登场。通过将 RfM 与 Tractor 和 RenderMan Pro Server (RPS) 配合实施，用户可以实现从 desktop 到 renderfarm 的 seamless integrated rendering workflow。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: is a system for distributing tasks from queued jobs across a network of compute servers. It includes a central queueing mechanism, a remote execution server, a monitoring subsystem, and a browser-based user interface. Tractor was designed as a high-performance replacement for Alfred and can be used in any work distribution capacity, but it is particularly well-suited for managing a RenderMan for Maya-to-RenderMan Pro Server pipeline.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 是一个 system，用于把 queued jobs 中的 tasks 分发到网络中的 compute servers。它包括 central queueing mechanism、remote execution server、monitoring subsystem 和 browser-based user interface。Tractor 被设计为 Alfred 的 high-performance replacement，可用于任何 work distribution capacity，但尤其适合管理 RenderMan for Maya 到 RenderMan Pro Server 的 pipeline。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Tractor is provided as a separate, standalone product, with its own documentation.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Tractor 作为单独的 standalone product 提供，并拥有自己的 documentation。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Pro Server
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Pro Server

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Pro Server is the foundation of a high-performance rendering pipeline. It provides standalone implementations of the renderer and its corresponding rendering utilities as well as access to APIs that allow savvy users to extend functionality. As the core technology, RenderMan Pro Server is the font from which all pixels flow.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Pro Server 是 high-performance rendering pipeline 的 foundation。它提供 renderer 及其对应 rendering utilities 的 standalone implementations，并提供 APIs，让熟练用户能够扩展 functionality。作为 core technology，RenderMan Pro Server 是所有 pixels 流出的源泉。
